name: Access Control
description: Requirements, control, and limitations for system and data access based for internal and remote sources across both users and processes

name: Asset Management
description: Identification, documentation, and management of information technology assets

name: Audit and Accountability
description: Activities and requirements related to the renention, analysis, and generation of audit data.

name: Awareness and Training
description: Conduct security awareness activities and training

name: Configuration Management
description: Establish and monitor configuration by tracking established baselines and change processes

name: Identification and Authentication
description: Apply zero-trust security principals to user and service access

name: Incident Response
description: Provide an incident response capability with robust planning, monitoring, reseponse capabilities

name: Maintenance
description: Track and manage the maintenance of technology assets

name: Media Protection
description: Ensure that media storing controlled unclassified information (CUI) is appropriately marked, secured and sanitized

name: Personnel Security
description: Screen and protect federal contract information during personnel actions

name: Recovery
description: Manage back-ups and information security continuity

name: Risk Management
description: Identify, evaluate, and manage direct and supply chain related risks

name: Security Assessment
description: Establish, manage and maintain security plans for information technology systems

name: Situational Awareness
description: Utilize threat identification and monitoring capabilities

name: System and Communications Protection
description: Define secure system and communication boundaries and control transmission of data across boundaries

name: System and Informational Integrity
description: Identify and mitigate vulnerabilities and risks of networks and systems
